_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 and 2 in Canada.

_contextSnippet: When looking at the NFTI-QoL, we only had one missing item in one patient, and we could obtain total scores for all patients; Cronbach's alpha was 0.87. The items with highest (worse) scores were hearing (median 2, range 1–3) and outlook on life (median 2, range 0–3)
details: Cronbach's alpha was 0.87. Only one missing item in one patient. Items with highest scores were hearing (median 2, range 1-3) and outlook on life (median 2, range 0-3).
